Lyrics.text:
Eo Aminao, ry Mpamonjy malala,
Eo Aminao izay feno ny soa,
Eo no aleha tsy hisalasala,
Eo hianinan’ny fonay tokoa.

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Eo Aminao, Jesosy ô,
Fanantenan’ny very
Eo Aminao, Jesosy ô,
No misy toky sy hery.

Eo Aminao, raha mamely Satana
Ka manangoly handavo anay;
Ianao irery no afaka hitana
Eo Aminao dia handresy izahay.

Eo Aminao, raha vesaran’ny ota
Ka toa hilofika re izahay
Eo Aminao, ry ’Lay antra mpanota
Eo Aminao no fitsaharanay.

Eo Aminao, raha mandrahona ny andro
Ka feno tahotra re ny fonay,
Eo Aminao, ry Ilay masoandro,
No hiverenan’ny toky indray.

Any Aminao, tsy ho ela intsony,
Any Aminao, ho mandrakizay,
’ Ndrey ny hasambarana any ambony
Any Aminao, Tompo, ho any izahay!
Hahita Anao, Mpamonjy ô,
Ry tokinay sy hery,
Hahita Anao, Jesosy ô,
Anao, Mpitia olom-bery.
